direct_dependencies.name: @react-native-vector-icons/lucide
direct_dependencies.purpose: Static Lucide tab icons and CNG font registration
direct_dependencies.platform_support: Android and iOS native font icon runtime
direct_dependencies.removal_path: Replace tab icons, remove the config plugin, then clean-prebuild both platforms.

direct_dependencies.name: @react-navigation/bottom-tabs
direct_dependencies.platform_support: Android and iOS through React Navigation
direct_dependencies.removal_path: Replace the root tab navigator and remove this package.

direct_dependencies.name: @react-navigation/native
direct_dependencies.purpose: Navigation container and shared navigation state
direct_dependencies.removal_path: Replace React Navigation at the composition root.

direct_dependencies.name: expo
direct_dependencies.purpose: Expo SDK and CNG application runtime
direct_dependencies.removal_path: Migrate the application away from Expo and replace CNG tooling.

direct_dependencies.name: expo-dev-client
direct_dependencies.removal_path: Remove when development builds no longer use Expo Dev Client, then clean-prebuild.

direct_dependencies.name: expo-secure-store
direct_dependencies.purpose: Revisioned API keys and secret model header values
direct_dependencies.platform_support: Android Keystore and iOS Keychain through Expo
direct_dependencies.removal_path: Migrate every referenced secret bundle to an equivalent native encrypted credential store before removing the config plugin.

direct_dependencies.name: expo-sqlite
direct_dependencies.purpose: Persistent user database, verified migrations, and FTS5-backed local search
direct_dependencies.platform_support: Android and iOS through the Expo SQLite native module
direct_dependencies.removal_path: Replace the database adapter and migration runtime, then clean-prebuild both platforms.

direct_dependencies.name: react
direct_dependencies.platform_support: Android and iOS via React Native
direct_dependencies.removal_path: Replace the React Native UI runtime.

direct_dependencies.name: react-native
direct_dependencies.removal_path: Replace the mobile runtime and all platform UI code.

direct_dependencies.name: react-native-safe-area-context
direct_dependencies.purpose: Root safe-area provider and inset-aware shell
direct_dependencies.removal_path: Replace safe-area ownership and clean-prebuild both platforms.

direct_dependencies.name: react-native-screens
direct_dependencies.removal_path: Remove with React Navigation native integration and clean-prebuild.

development_dependencies.name: @testing-library/react-native
development_dependencies.removal_path: Replace component tests with an equivalent React Native harness.

development_dependencies.name: @types/jest
development_dependencies.removal_path: Remove with Jest or replace its type declarations.

development_dependencies.name: @types/node
development_dependencies.removal_path: Remove when Node tooling is replaced.

development_dependencies.name: @types/react
development_dependencies.purpose: React application and test type declarations
development_dependencies.platform_support: Host-side TypeScript for Android and iOS sources
development_dependencies.removal_path: Remove with React or replace its type declarations.

development_dependencies.name: eslint
development_dependencies.removal_path: Replace with an equivalent linter and boundary checker.

development_dependencies.name: eslint-config-expo
development_dependencies.platform_support: Host-side checks for Android and iOS sources
development_dependencies.removal_path: Replace the Expo lint configuration when the runtime changes.

development_dependencies.name: expo-doctor
development_dependencies.removal_path: Replace with an equivalent locked Expo compatibility check.

development_dependencies.name: jest
development_dependencies.purpose: Application unit and component test runner
development_dependencies.removal_path: Migrate application tests to another runner.

development_dependencies.name: jest-expo
development_dependencies.purpose: Expo 57 Jest transforms and native mocks
development_dependencies.platform_support: Host-side Android and iOS component simulation
development_dependencies.removal_path: Replace with the matching test preset when Expo changes.

development_dependencies.name: react-test-renderer
development_dependencies.purpose: React Native component rendering under Jest
development_dependencies.removal_path: Remove with the current React Native test renderer stack.

development_dependencies.name: tsx
development_dependencies.purpose: Node TypeScript contract tests and local tools
development_dependencies.removal_path: Compile Node tools before execution or replace the runner.

development_dependencies.name: typescript
development_dependencies.purpose: Strict app, test, tool, G015 and G016 typechecking
development_dependencies.removal_path: Replace only after an equivalent static type system is adopted.

audit_policy.documented_moderate: Expo 57.0.4 currently inherits moderate CLI/config/xcode/uuid advisories. npm's force remediation is incompatible with the exact Expo 57 runtime and is rejected; high and critical findings remain blocking.

excluded.name: eventsource-parser
excluded.reason: Owned only by the frozen G017 transport spike until Slice 4.
